title: Political rally in Ziradei draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Ziradei promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Ziradei, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.
